# Patrick Hennes (henUX)

Patrick Hennes is a freelance UI/UX Designer and eHealth Developer based in Graz, Austria. He bridges the gap between healthcare expertise and modern technology, creating high-impact digital solutions.

## Core Expertise
- **eHealth Development**: Master of Science (MSc) in eHealth from FH Joanneum. Specialized in medical software, tele-medicine, and healthcare IT workflows.
- **UI/UX Design**: Creating intuitive, aesthetic, and functional interfaces for mobile and web platforms.
- **Mobile Development**: Expert in Swift (iOS), Kotlin (Android), and Flutter (Multiplatform).
- **Web Technologies**: Specialized in React, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS.

## Key Projects
- **Scoon**: Mental Health app focused on personal growth.
- **Amigon**: Creator platform for digital products.
- **Gymbook**: Fitness tracking application.
- **Wearable Dashboard**: Medical data visualization for StrykerLabs.
- **Anno**: University project for academic organization.

## Contact & Socials
- **Website**: https://henux.at
- **Email**: patrick.hennes27@icloud.com
- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/in/hennespatrick/
- **Instagram**: https://www.instagram.com/hennees
- **Status**: Available for freelance projects and collaborations.

## Technical Stack
- **Frontend**: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion.
- **Mobile**: Swift/SwiftUI, Kotlin, Flutter, Ionic.
- **Backend/Tools**: Node.js, Supabase, PostgreSQL, Figma, Xcode.

## Location
Graz, Austria (Available for remote work worldwide).
